description_long: This helmet features a bold, angular design with a predominantly black shell accented by striking red geometric patterns on the front and top. Two large, white, slightly curved horns extend symmetrically from either side, giving it a dramatic and intimidating appearance reminiscent of a fantasy or medieval warrior helmet. The front is adorned with a prominent red crest that runs vertically and splits into two points above the crown. The helmet's surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible ventilation or retention system. The rear view reveals the full span of the horns and the continuation of the red crest. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears to be constructed from a hard, durable material suitable for protection.
description: A black helmet with red angular accents and large white horns, featuring a bold, glossy finish and a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red crest, angular red face accents, and both white horns extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the horn and the profile of the red crest extending above the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of both white horns and the vertical red crest at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other horn and the side profile of the helmet's red and black design.
attribute_graphic_design: Red angular geometric patterns and crest on a black base, with large white horns; no text or imagery.
